scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/donor-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/matching-service" "npm run start --workspace=services/ai-service"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/donor-dashboard && npm run build --workspace=apps/ngo-dashboard && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin-panel
